channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Northern California horse racing faces grim future
item.description: The California Authority of Racing Fairs this week announced that it would abandon plans to organize horse racing meets this year throughout several county fairs in the upper half of the state.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Martin, The Mercury News

item.title: Ex-NFL player Kyle Rudolph discusses Vikings' QB decision, referees, the Super Bowl and NFL Draft giveaways
item.description: Former Pro Bowl tight end Kyle Rudolph sat down with Fox News Digital to discuss the Vikings' quarterback decision, NFL refs and his charity's upcoming giveaways.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rangers get center J.T. Miller from Canucks in multiplayer deal
item.description: The New York Rangers acquired veteran center J.T. Miller from the Vancouver Canucks in a multiplayer deal on Friday night. The Rangers sent center Filip Chytil, defenseman Victor Mancini and a 2025 conditional draft pick to Vancouver.
item.dc:creator: VIN A. CHERWOO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mercury acquire Satou Sabally from Wings as part of 3-team deal, AP source says
item.description: Satou Sabally is heading to the Phoenix Mercury as part of a three-team trade, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Friday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the deal hadn't been announced.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts addresses infamous 'straightjacket' comment directed at coach Nick Sirianni
item.description: Nick Sirianni's relationship with Jalen Hurts has been widely discussed for almost two seasons, but the Eagles star quarterback is making it clear the duo are on the same page.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: Local pro bull rider representing Navajo Nation
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Pro Bull Riders Tour is coming back to Salt Lake City next weekend for the Unleash the Beats event at the Delta Center. At this level, the relationship between bull rider and bull has to be in sync, like a wild dance.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Francis Parker 46, La Jolla Country Day 45
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO) - Marquee matchup out at Francis Parker as they play host to La Jolla Country Day. Francis Parker's Brianna Mendez and Isabella Riddle would combine for 28 points on the night, leading the charge in their 46-45 win over La Jolla Country Day.. a feat some may had not seen coming.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita boys win 2OT thriller at Montrose for first place in SWL, as Fruita girls dominate Red Hawks
item.description: One of the most highly anticipated games of the season, Montrose vs. Fruita, a battle of the top two teams in the Southwestern league, exceeded expectations.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Connor Bedard's spectacular goal sparks Blackhawks to 4-1 win over Lightning
item.description: Connor Bedard scored from a seemingly impossible angle, Arvid Soderblom stopped 34 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 4-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — On the same evening the Chicago Bears are reportedly hiring their next defensive coordinator, the Bears have also committed to a new offensive coordinator under first-year head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
